text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I want to compete in the Derby, I have to push my body further
than ever!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'll work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
For the dream I share with Maruzen... and starting from today, for you
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O needs no reminder to work hard. So if there's
anything I can do as her trainer, it would be...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you going somewhere too?
choice_data_list: Thought I'd check out the bookstore.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The bookstore! Wait, are you after The Complete Book of Winning Proverbs that just went on sale today too?!
choice_data_list: Er, I had another book in mind, actually.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, n-never mind then. For a second there I thought you were one of
us... Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but we're still going to the same place. If you don't mind, how
about we go together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any reason to say no, so we head to the bookstore
together.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yay! Got what I came for!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The hottest new publication in the proverb world... I don't know what
I would've done if it was sold out.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Trainer? Don't tell me you're going to buy that entire mountain
of books!
choice_data_list:
I-I'll have them split it into two bags, so we're
good!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Your arms are shaking! I'll help carry some!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: There we go... I didn't know you were such an avid reader.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Umamusume Growth Theory, and Post-Debut Training Techniques? Wait, are these all...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: They're for me, aren't they?! You really didn't have to...
choice_data_list: There's not much I can really do to help you.
There's not much I can really do to help you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: So I might as well go all out where I can.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ohh... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maybe you and I do have something in common after all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All I could ever do was play it safe, sticking it out and staying
dedicated to practice, practice, and more practice...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I just kept fighting, maybe I could move at least a few steps
forward... That was what kept me going.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The shoes I was trying to fill were so big, there were times when I
almost lost my footing, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I kept working at it! Because otherwise, I never would've met
such an amazing trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In my room that night, as I'm digging into the books I purchased...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: To my hard-working trainer...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Today was fun! I feel like I was able to learn a little more about you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and those training books! I bet you're reading them right now,
aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It made me really happy to hear how you felt! But don't feel like you
have to do so much, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Lastly, a little proverb to cheer you on. "Walk as two, leave footprints
of four!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So let's keep on forging ahead as two! Okay, I'll see you at training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The proverb doesn't quite compute, but it's the thought that counts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start typing out a short thank you, then change my mind and reach
for the call button.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: H-hello? Chiyono O here! Did something urgent come up?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is this about the message I just sent? D-did I say something
weird?
choice_data_list: No, I just wanted to say thanks.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thanks?
choice_data_list: You really got me motivated. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, I'm just glad I could be helpful!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I think that was one of my best proverbs yet! Feel free to use it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The proper usage of her proverb still eludes me, but for now, I'll just
enjoy this chat with Chiyono O.
